text: There’s an uncanny stillness in these spaces. The glass and neat lines make me feel slightly detached, as if I’m observing something in between states—private yet public, purposeful yet empty. The second room’s colorful wall and the words about research and innovation invite me to contemplate progress, but also make me aware of my own role as both participant and observer. I feel a mild curiosity tangled with a quiet sense of exposure, as if standing on the threshold of ideas that are just out of reach.
